person.name: Adelaide de Breteuil
person.alternateName: Adéle de Breteuil Dame de Nanteuil le Haudouin
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
geni.com NN (possibly Adèle) de Breteuil
 Birthdate: circa 990 Birthplace: Bréteuïl, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France Death: September 11, 1051 (56-65) Bréteuïl, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France Immediate Family: Daughter of Hildouin de Breteuil, Vicomte de Chartres and Emmeline de Chartres 

Wife of Raoul de Mantes, Comte de Valois et d'Amiens 

Mother of Raoul III "le Grand" de Mantes, Comte de Valois et d'Amiens et du Vexin 

Sister of Evrard I, comte de Breteuil; Havoise de Breteuil; Harduin de Breteuil; Hugues de Breteuil and Galeran de Breteuil Half sister of Adele De Clermont Occupation: Dame, de Ramerupt, de Clermont, de Breteuil, de Bar, de Vitry   HILDUIN [Gilduin], son of --- (-St Vanne, Verdun 18 May [1060]). Vicomte de Chartres. He founded the abbey of Coulombs in 1025. "…Gilduini vicecomitis Carnotensi…" subscribed the charter dated [1027/28] under which Robert II King of France confirmed donations to Coulombs[426]. He founded the abbey of Saint-Jean-en-Vallée, Chartres in 1036. Comte de Breteuil. "Gelduinus" donated property by charter dated to [1038/40] which names "propinquo meo…Fulcherio, seniorisque mei Odonis…comitis, coniugis mea…Emelinæ filiorumque meorum Evrardi, Arduini, Hugonis episcopi, Gelduini et Fulcherii Carnotensis propinqui mei", subscribed by "Gelduini vicecomitis, Harduin vicecomitis filius eius, Ebrardi fratris eius, Gualerandi fratris eius…Hervei vicecomitis"[427]. "Gelduinus de Bretulio et filius eius Harduinus vicecomes Carnotensis" donated property by charter dated to [1048/60][428]. "Gelduinus…vicecomes" donated a serf to Marmoutier, for the soul of "meique filii Harduini", with the consent of "domino meo Tetbaldo comite…filio meo Ebrardo", by charter dated to [1046/64] signed by "Ermengarde comitisse, Gerduini vicecomitis, Ebrardi filii eius, Ebrardi filii Ebrardi, Hugonis fratris eius, Adeladis sororis eorum, Guarini Tyrensis filii…Ilberti filii Nivelonis, Fulcherii fratris eius, Girardi fratris eius…Hugonis vicecomitis, Hilgodi filii episcopi…"[429]. The necrology of Chartres cathedral records the death "XV Kal Jun" of "Gelduinus ex vicecomite monachus", recording that he donated property at "Ciconiolas" for his soul and that of "filii sui Harduini"[430]. The necrology of Verdun Saint-Vanne records the death "XV Kal Jun" of "domnus Gelduinus pater domni abbatis Waleranni"[431].

e) ADELA [Alix] de Breteuil (-11 Sep 1051). The primary source which confirms her parentage and marriage has not yet been identified. m RAOUL [II] Comte de Valois, d'Amiens et de Crépy, son of GAUTHIER [II] "le Blanc" Comte de Mantes, de Valois, d'Amiens et de Crépy & his wife Adela --- (-1060).

sourceList.title: Adele de Bar-Sur-Aube, "Find A Grave Index"
Adélaïde Adèle de VALOIS ou de CREPY, Dame de Nanteuil le Haudoin (née de BRETEUIL), 'MyHeritage Family Trees'

zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelaide de Breteuil於0992年2月15日出生在法國皮卡迪奧易布利易爾時，她的父親Hilduin de Breteuil Vicomte de Chartres23歲，母親Emmeline Chartres18歲。她於1010年與Raoul III de Vexin在法國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1051年9月10日在法國皮卡迪奧易可雷--瓦洛易斯享年59歲，埋葬在法國皮卡迪奧易可雷--瓦洛易斯。

nameMeanings.name: de

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Adelaide
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin (via French Adélaïde ), from adal ‘noble’ + heid ‘kind, sort’. It was borne in the 10th century by the wife of the Holy Roman Emperor Otto the Great. She became regent after his death and was revered as a saint. The given name increased in popularity in England during the 19th century, when it was borne by the wife of King William IV; she was the daughter of the ruler of the German duchy of Saxe-Meiningen. The Australian city of Adelaide was named in her honour.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelaide de Breteuil was born on 15 February 0992, in Breteuil, Oise, Picardie, France, her father, Hilduin de Breteuil Vicomte de Chartres, was 23 and her mother, Emmeline Chartres, was 18. She married Raoul III de Vexin in 1010, in France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 10 September 1051, in Crépy-en-Valois, Oise, Picardie, France, at the age of 59, and was buried in Crépy-en-Valois, Oise, Picardie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelaide de Breteuil est née le 15 février 0992, à Breteuil, Oise, Picardie, France, son père, Hilduin de Breteuil Vicomte de Chartres, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Emmeline Chartres, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Raoul III de Vexin en 1010, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 10 septembre 1051, à Crépy-en-Valois, Oise, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Crépy-en-Valois, Oise, Picardie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelaide de Breteuil am 15. Februar 0992 in Breteuil, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hilduin de Breteuil Vicomte de Chartres 23 und ihre Mutter Emmeline Chartres 18. Sie hat 1010 in Frankreich Raoul III de Vexin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 10. September 1051 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Crépy-en-Valois, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich und wurde in Crépy-en-Valois, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelaide de Breteuil è nata il il 15 febbraio 0992 nel Breteuil, Oise, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Hilduin de Breteuil Vicomte de Chartres, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Emmeline Chartres, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Raoul III de Vexin nel 1010, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 10 settembre 1051, nel Crépy-en-Valois, Oise, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Crépy-en-Valois, Oise, Picardie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Adelaide de Breteuilが0992年2月15日にフランスピカーディオイゼブレテウイルで生まれた時，父Hilduin de Breteuil Vicomte de Chartresは23歳，母Emmeline Chartresは18歳であった。1010年にフランスでRaoul III de Vexinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1051年9月10日にフランスピカーディオイゼクルeプイ-エン-ヴァロイスで59歳で死去し，フランスピカーディオイゼクルeプイ-エン-ヴァロイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelaide de Breteuil(이)가 0992년 2월 15일 프랑스 피카디 이스 브레테우일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hilduin de Breteuil Vicomte de Chartres(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emmeline Chartres(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1010년 프랑스에서 Raoul III de Vexin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1051년 9월 10일 프랑스 피카디 이스 크ep이--발이스에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 피카디 이스 크ep이--발이스에 묻혔다.

pt.15 February 0992–10 September 1051: 15 de fevereiro de 0992–10 de setembro de 1051
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelaide de Breteuil nasceu em 15 de fevereiro de 0992, em Breteuil, Oise, Picardie, França, seu pai, Hilduin de Breteuil Vicomte de Chartres, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Emmeline Chartres, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Raoul III de Vexin em 1010, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 10 de setembro de 1051, em Crépy-en-Valois, Oise, Picardie, França, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Crépy-en-Valois, Oise, Picardie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelaide de Breteuil родилась 15 февраля 0992 г. в местности бретеуил, оис, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Hilduin de Breteuil Vicomte de Chartres было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Emmeline Chartres, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Raoul III de Vexin в 1010 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 10 сентября 1051 г. в местности крeпи-ен-валоис, оис, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности крeпи-ен-валоис, оис, пикарди, Франция.

es.15 February 0992–10 September 1051: 15 de febrero de 0992–10 de septiembre de 1051
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adelaide de Breteuil nació el 15 de febrero de 0992, en Breteuil, Oise, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Hilduin de Breteuil Vicomte de Chartres, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Emmeline Chartres, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Raoul III de Vexin en 1010, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 10 de septiembre de 1051, en Crépy-en-Valois, Oise, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Crépy-en-Valois, Oise, Picardie, Francia.
